Step into timeless elegance with this stunning red Anarkali set designed to make every festive moment memorable. Crafted in a rich red fabric adorned with delicate gold motifs, the outfit features a gracefully flared silhouette that offers both comfort and sophistication.
The ensemble is paired with a beautifully embroidered net dupatta featuring intricate lattice work and a detailed gold border that adds a touch of regal charm. The coordinated bottom with embellished hem detailing completes the look with refined elegance.

title: Beige Glow Lehenga Set
description: A radiant beige-toned lehenga set featuring a delicately embellished blouse paired with a voluminous skirt adorned with intricate sequin and thread work. The ensemble is complemented by a sheer, embroidered dupatta that adds softness and graceful movement. Perfect for weddings, receptions, and festive celebrations, this look exudes understated glamour with a timeless, elegant appeal.

title: Sand Bloom Sharara Set
description: A beautifully crafted beige sharara set adorned with intricate multicolored floral embroidery that adds a vibrant yet elegant touch. The straight-cut kurta is richly detailed with delicate embellishments, paired with flowy sharara pants that create a graceful silhouette. Finished with a soft sheer dupatta featuring fine borders and scattered floral accents, this ensemble is perfect for festive occasions, weddings, and daytime celebrations, blending subtle tones with lively detailing.

title: Ivory Contrast Anarkali Set
description: A graceful ivory Anarkali set adorned with delicate embroidery, paired with a vibrant rose-pink dupatta featuring intricate borders. The flowing silhouette of the Anarkali adds elegance and movement, while the rich contrast of the dupatta enhances its festive appeal. Perfect for weddings, celebrations, and special occasions, this ensemble blends subtle sophistication with traditional charm.

title: The Patchouli Palace Lehenga
description: Unveiling The Patchouli Palace Lehenga Created with mirror inspired artwork with flamingos and sheesh mahal panels the lehenga brings together colours of flamingos in the grand tulle veil and a canvas in rambagh silk dyed in sky colour. Featuring kachi dori, zardozi, crystals and mini mirrors.

title: The Silent Garden Tulle Japanese pink lehenga
description: Unveiling The Silent Garden Japanese Pink Lehenga An ode to love in nature the lehenga is inspired by serene meadows with cherry blossoms, butterflies and pixies. Like a midsummers eve the lehenga dreams over a Japanese Pink tulle canvas. Introducing a new language in resham aari that subtly sits on the colour of the tulle, adorned with fine zardozi & finished with crystal work. The lehenga is a light weight translation of Matsya’s signature couture craft made to dance, and be easy on the wedding day.

title: The Amanbagh Lehenga
description: Unveiling The Amanbagh Lehenga A landscape of blending the Tuscan villas & florentine landscape with Jaipuri colours in resham ari. A serene contradiction that creates an amalgamation of pinks, greens and peaches with gold over Rambagh silk in resham aari, kachi dori & resham ari finished with zardozi. Cypress trees feature on the lehenga, blouse & veil. Needle cut pearl cut through the hem of the lehenga.

title: The Vintage Royal Maze lehenga
description: Unveiling The Vintage Royal Maza LehengaCreated with royal palatial inspiration the lehenga is created on silk tissue in Ekru crafted with kachi dori and vintage zardozi and pittan embroidery. The artwork is a geographical maze with elements of indian flora and fauna. Paired with a tulle veil with a grand top flowing down with crystals and the Matsya wings across an intricate pittan pattern on the border.

title: The Wild Seascape French Rose lehenga
description: Unveiling The Wild Seascape French Rose LehengaCreated with artwork that comes from a Matsya inspired art project with exotic wild ocean flora finished with a border that has the Matsya fishes themselves & translated with Kachi Dori and evolved modern zardozi with crystals. The blouse has a signature matsya winged hem & the lehenga features our iconic V-winged belt. The canvas is our iconic French Rose Silk Velvet with a Veil in Tulle bordered with opulent tarnished silver Zardozi.

title: The Vintage Matsya Palace Ekru Lehenga
description: Unveiling The Vintage Matsya Palace Ekru Lehenga CreatedThe palace artwork is inspired by a series of windows layered over each other peeping with heritage and matsya signature elements. Crafted in vintage gold kachi dori and zardozi finished with antique crystals and a royal layered border. The canvas is silk velvet dipped in Aged Ekru paired with a tulle veil & dupatta with a heavy border. The lehenga is a symbol of heritage & royalty featuring the Matsya V wing and a Nawabi cut blouse.

title: The Vintage Tuscan Heritage Lehenga
description: Unveiling The Vinatage Tuscan Heritage Lehenga Built with our signature opulent zardozi & kachi dori the lehenga is made to recreate a lush Tuscan landscape with vintage homes & flora representing a life of exploration, love & serenity. Featuring cypress trees, Tuscan palms & heritage villas in antique kachi dori. Finished with our iconic V-wing belt and a delicate needle cut border across the tulle veil & lehenga hem in vintage Zardozi. Paired with an optional Palace Veil with a Chantley trail speaking Modern Royalty.

title: The Nizami Maze Lehenga
description: Unveiling The Nizami Maza LehengaCreated with royal palatial inspirations and colours the lehenga feathers tulle appliqués on our signature rambagh silk crafted with kachi dori and vintage zardozi. The artwork is a geographical maze with elements of indian flora and fauna. Paired with an aged rose tulle veil with a grand top flowing down with crystals and the Matsya wings across an intricate appliqué pattern on the border.

title: The Tuscan heritage landscape lehenga
description: Unveiling The Tuscan Heritage Lehenga Built with our signature opulent zardozi & kachi dori the lehenga is made to recreate a lush Tuscan landscape with vintage homes & flora representing a life of exploration, love & serenity. The cypress trees are created with mini mirrors and the Tuscan palms are done with kachi dori. Finished with our iconic V-wing belt and a delicate needle cut border across the tulle veil & lehenga hem edged with pearls. The silk tissue on the sage canvas inspires calm & peace that wish over the union.

"The Aayan ensemble showcases intricate hand work on a lehenga, made in pure Silk Chanderi fabric.
